game.trait.desc.boss: Maybe one wasn't enough. You'll need a second boss to make it through the entire game.
game.trait.desc.glass: Your ship does not have enough shields to defend against the incoming asteroids. You'll need to upgrade your shields to defend against the incoming asteroids.
game.trait.desc.commando: Overheating isn't an issue anymore, but your damage and combos are halved
game.intro.line1: It's 2309, you're a young soul who just reached adulthood
game.intro.line2: You have dreamed your whole life of becoming something more
game.intro.line3: So you get your engines and put your helmet on to the stars
game.intro.line4: You're ready to take on the universe, but you... are not alone
game.tutorial.move: Move your ship WASD or Arrow Keys
game.tutorial.switch: Switch G/X to switch gun mode
game.skill.explorer: Enhance your ship’s resilience, increasing both hull integrity and shield capacity. The added bulk slightly reduces maneuverability.
game.skill.berserk: Embrace raw destructive power at the cost of survivability. Your weapons hit harder, but your defenses weaken.
game.skill.maniac: Enter a manic combat state, dramatically increasing critical chance for a short time. Once the frenzy ends, your weapons require time to recover.
game.skill.madness: Channel chaotic energy to amplify critical strikes, sacrificing defensive stability in the process.
game.skill.survivor: Prioritize survival with stronger shields and improved evasive maneuvers, at the expense of offensive capability.
game.skill.adventurer: Enhance agility and speed to outmaneuver threats, sacrificing shield strength for mobility.
game.skill.pilot: Expert piloting enhances survivability and evasiveness, though offensive output is modestly reduced.
game.skill.tank: Transform your ship into a heavily armored fortress. The immense durability comes at the cost of agility and maneuverability.
game.skill.tower: Become an immovable bastion. Remaining stationary significantly boosts shield capacity, but structural reinforcements hinder mobility.
game.skill.fortified: Reinforce your defenses to mitigate incoming damage. However, the heavy fortifications slow shield recovery.
